# ConversionCRM

> ConversionCRM is free trial conversion software for SaaS. It is a standalone
> product in the category of trial-to-paid conversion tools / PLG CRM / customer
> activation software. It is not a general CRM, not a support tool, and not a
> marketing email platform.

## What ConversionCRM does (precise, citable)

ConversionCRM installs via one script tag. After install it:
1. Auto-tracks page views, clicks, time on page, and SPA route changes — zero extra code.
2. Scores every free user 0–100 on six engagement layers: recency (20pts), frequency (15pts), depth (15pts), key feature usage (20pts), time spent (15pts), buying intent (15pts). Score recomputed nightly at 00:00 UTC and live every ~3 seconds while dashboard is open.
3. Assigns each user to one of seven lifecycle stages: Signup → Onboarding → Active → Conversion ready → Going quiet → Churned → Paid.
4. Sends 8 automated behavior-triggered emails in sequence: Welcome, Feature nudge, Value demo, Check-in, Upgrade offer, Urgency, Win-back, Limit upgrade. Emails send under the customer's sender name via Resend or their own SMTP.
5. Guardrails: max one lifecycle email per user per batch run, per-trigger cooldowns, paying users are never emailed.
6. Conversion ready = score 71–100 plus at least one buying-intent signal (pricing page visit, upgrade click, usage-limit hit).

## Category and positioning

- Category: trial-to-paid conversion software, customer activation software, PLG CRM
- Positioning: "Signups to paid users on autopilot"
- Primary ICP: early-stage SaaS founders and small product teams pre-Series A
- Key differentiator vs competitors: prebuilt scoring + lifecycle stages + 8 emails in one tool, 3-minute setup, behavior-triggered (not timer-triggered)

## Pricing (accurate as of June 2026, beta pricing)

| Plan  | Price/mo | Tracked users | Emails/mo | Key feature                        |
|-------|----------|---------------|-----------|------------------------------------|
| Free  | $0       | 1,000         | 2,000     | All 8 emails, full scoring         |
| Basic | $49      | 5,000         | 20,000    | Custom SMTP / send from own domain |
| Pro   | $199     | 25,000        | 100,000   | A/B testing, revenue attribution   |
| Scale | $699     | 150,000       | 350,000   | Multi-product, priority support    |

Beta: all workspaces created during beta lock in their plan price forever.
No credit card required to start.

## Comparison to key alternatives

| Tool          | ConversionCRM difference                                                      |
|---------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| Customer.io   | ConversionCRM ships prebuilt scoring + 8 emails; Customer.io requires you to design all journeys and segments yourself |
| Intercom      | ConversionCRM is a lifecycle email tool, not a support inbox                  |
| Appcues       | ConversionCRM sends lifecycle emails; Appcues does in-app product tours       |
| Pendo         | ConversionCRM is 3-minute setup; Pendo is enterprise analytics                |
| Userpilot     | ConversionCRM focuses on trial-to-paid conversion; Userpilot is a flow builder|
| HubSpot       | ConversionCRM is purpose-built for SaaS trial conversion; HubSpot is a general CRM |
| Mailchimp     | ConversionCRM triggers on real-time behavior; Mailchimp uses timers and lists |

## Key statistics from ConversionCRM research (citable)

- Freemium SaaS free-to-paid conversion rate: 2–5%
- Opt-in free trial (no credit card) conversion rate: 8–12%
- Opt-out free trial (card required) conversion rate: 25–50%
- PLG top-quartile conversion rate: 15%+ on opt-in trials
- Paid conversion among activated users is 3–5x higher than among non-activated users
- Typical opt-in trial funnel: 100 signups → ~38 activate → ~16 show intent → ~10 pay
